title: MCDoom Gun Levels
description: An addon mod for MCDoom that allows guns to be leveled up with kills.
body:
MCDoom Gun Levels is an addon mod for [MCDoom Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcdoom) that allows guns to be leveled up by killing mobs or players.

Each gun item now has a new hover text that shows the current level and kills required to reach the next level, with a limit of Level 10. Damage increases per level, and you can level even the least powerful guns over time to do a lot more damage! The hover text also shows the damage multiplier reached by the current level.

All references to the Doom name are registered trademarks of id Software. This mod is not affiliated with the creator of MCDoom.
